description_long: This house features a stately facade with a large, central wooden double door framed by stonework and flanked by tall windows with black wrought-iron railings. The upper story showcases three prominent windows, each with its own small balcony, and is adorned with brick and stone detailing. The building's exterior combines red brick on the lower half with light-colored stone trim, giving it a classic, historic appearance. A continuous black metal balcony runs across the first floor, supported by ornate brackets. The roofline is flat, with a partial parapet and decorative stonework on one corner. The structure sits on a tiled sidewalk, suggesting an urban street setting.
description: A two-story house with a grand wooden door, brick and stone facade, and wrought-iron balconies on both levels. The design is classic and urban, with symmetrical windows and decorative stonework.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wooden double door, tall windows with black railings, and three upper-story balconies.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's narrow depth and the projection of the balconies and stone trim.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, plain back wall, and the window and door placements without decorative railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the building's thin profile and stone corner detailing.
attribute_entryway_design: Large central wooden double door with stone framing, no steps, and a continuous black metal balcony above.
